untranslatable_reason: This signal is an options strategy (bearish calendar spread with put options) that requires options-specific parameters including strike selection, time decay decay modeling, and option expiration dates. The backtest engine indicators provided are equity price/technical indicators only and do not support options pricing, Greeks (delta, theta, vega), strike price relationships, or expiration-based exit logic. Core components like 'sell near-term put', 'buy longer-term put', 'stock above strike price', and 'near-term expiration' cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using close price > strike (50) as entry proxy and close <= strike as exit proxy, but this loses critical optionality aspects: (1) no way to model time value decay differential between January and April puts, (2) no way to specify 'near-term expires' condition based on calendar days, (3) no way to encode the specific strike selection logic for OTM puts, (4) no way to model the spread's actual P&L which depends on implied volatility changes and theta decay rates. A proper implementation would require options Greeks indicators (theta, vega), implied volatility levels, and expiration date tracking.
